description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build OSW Emulator (Ubuntu) that runs on push and pull requests to specific branches, ignoring certain paths. The workflow checks if a run should be skipped, and if not, it builds the emulator in a matrix of Debug and Release configurations on ubuntu-22.04. The build process involves checking out the repository with LFS support, updating and installing packages, installing Python dependencies, creating a build directory, running CMake, Make, and tests, and uploading test artifacts on failure.
